steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The key causal clause is “by lengthening the period in which they are providing financial support to their nonworking parents.” Longer support obligations leave workers less able to build their own wealth. The blank must mean hinders or blocks wealth creation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'stymie': Means to block or prevent. Delaying transfers stymies wealth creation — the extended financial burden on workers prevents them from accumulating their own wealth. ✓
  • Choice B — 'compound': Means to increase or add to. This implies wealth creation grows despite the longer support period — the opposite of the passage's logic. ✗
  • Choice C — 'disparage': Means to speak negatively of. Disparage applies to speech or reputation, not to financial impact on wealth creation. ✗
  • Choice D — 'outstrip': Means to surpass or exceed. This would suggest wealth creation exceeds some other measure — again opposite to the intended harm. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
